specific_mechanism: Under extreme contact pressure, boundary lubrication transitions from elastohydrodynamic film to direct asperity contact; lubrication failure follows a stress-corrosion-cracking-like statistical distribution
llm_application: LLM safety boundary analog: under high prompt-injection pressure, alignment 'lubrication' transitions from soft-prompt deflection to direct training-data leak; failure follows stress-cracking distribution.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes tribology basin-stability mapping as proposed.
